intro.subtitle: Driven by Design
intro.titleMain: We design digital experiences that empower brands
intro.titleSecondary: to stand out and engage their audiences.
intro.description: By combining strategy, design, and technology, we transform ideas into meaningful digital experiences. Our work blends imagination with precision to create bold outcomes that drive growth.

about.subTag: Your partner in brand strategy and web creation
about.sloganPoint1: leverages strategic planning and solid execution
about.sloganPoint2: shape your brand's direction and bring it to life

slogan.row2: can hold the unique experience of a brand.
slogan.row4: we help people remember your moments.

description.p1:
A [[Lunar studio]] that brings your brand story to life,
going beyond simply designing or building websites,
understanding our clients' [[challenges and aspirations]]
and completing everything with [[strategy and emotion]]
 that perfectly fits the brand.
description.p2:
At Lunar Studio, instead of relying on experience, we use [[careful analysis]] and a [[personalized approach]]
to clearly convey the message your brand truly wants to deliver,
and create results that resonate and are loved by your audience.
description.p3:
With 99% [[strategic planning]] and 1% [[instinct]],
we create experiences that are memorable for the brand 
 and satisfying for the user.

niji.name: Niji
niji.description: Niji is a website project created for a Japanese sushi restaurant. The design and user experience were carefully refined to provide a unique online experience.

details.problem: The original site was hosted on PythonAnywhere with outdated technologies and unnecessary database dependencies, making updates and maintenance cumbersome.
approach: Migrated the website to WordPress for a more flexible platform
Simplified backend structure by removing redundant systems
Improved accessibility and ease of navigation
details.solution: The redesigned website is now clean, accessible, and easy to maintain, with a modern interface that enhances user experience and streamlines content management.

whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.stat1Desc: For over a decade, we’ve been shaping digital experiences and building strong brands.
whyChooseUs.stat1DescHighlight: Our years of knowledge ensure every project is backed by skill, strategy, and creativity.
whyChooseUs.stat2Desc: We measure success by the impact we create. With a near-perfect satisfaction rate,
whyChooseUs.stat2DescHighlight: our clients trust us to deliver solutions that exceed expectations every time.

1.title: Results-Driven Approach...
1.desc: We saw immediate results in our online visibility and engagement. Their strategies are effective, data-driven, and tailored to our needs.
1.author: Emily Carter

2.title: Innovative Solutions...
2.desc: They consistently deliver fresh ideas and innovative solutions that keep our brand ahead of the curve. A true asset to our business.
2.author: James Lawson

3.title: Professional Team
3.desc: They showed professionalism at every stage. The results exceeded expectations.
3.author: Michael Ross

4.title: Creative Excellence
4.desc: The design quality is fantastic. They captured our brand values perfectly.
4.author: Sarah Jenkins

5.title: Strategic Growth
5.desc: A partner that thinks about business growth beyond just design. Highly recommended.
5.author: David Miller

items.a1: We provide comprehensive branding, web design, and digital strategy services tailored to your business needs.
items.q2: How long does a project take?
items.a2: Typically, a standard project takes 4-8 weeks depending on the complexity and feedback cycles.
items.q3: Do you work with all industries?
items.a3: Yes, we have experience across tech, fashion, lifestyle, and corporate sectors.
items.a4: Absolutely. We offer flexible packages that can be adjusted based on your specific goals.
items.a5: Just click the 'Ask a Question' button below or contact us via email to schedule an initial consultation.
